title: Will Smith
compiled_truth: Will Smith is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-13 to 2002-02-06), Will Smith sent 71 and received 114 emails, totalling 185 interactions. Top correspondents: [Cara Semperger](people/cara-semperger) (54), [Corry Bentley](people/corry-bentley) (30), [Vishwanatha Venkataswami](people/vishwanatha-venkataswami) (15), [Asem Atta](people/asem-atta) (15), [Duong Luu](people/duong-luu) (11). Mailbox folders observed: deleted_items, inbox, it, renewable_power, scheduling, stuff.
